subject: feat(map): add interactive Mapbox map on web platform
body:
Replace plain-text fallback with full mapbox-gl JS map on web.
FuelMap now conditionally loads native SDK or mapbox-gl per platform.
Custom HTML markers match native style (teal pill with price label).

Tags: map, web, mapbox, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: web-map-support
Semver: minor

title: add interactive Mapbox map on web platform
